title: Sales Account Executive
raw_jd: Own full-cycle B2B sales for a workflow automation SaaS product. Prospect target accounts, run discovery, build business cases, manage CRM hygiene, negotiate commercial terms, and close new annual contracts. Partner with customer success for handoff and expansion signals. Experience selling to operations or finance leaders is preferred.
expected_nice_to_haves: Experience with operations or finance buyers
expected_disqualifiers: No evidence of quota-carrying B2B sales experience
Unable to describe ethical sales practices
scoring_notes: Strong candidates show quota ownership, sourced pipeline, disciplined CRM usage, and evidence of consultative selling.
